name: animated-counter
description: Scroll-triggered count-up animation using Intersection Observer. Numbers animate from 0 to target value when section enters viewport. Configurable via data attributes.

data_attributes.data-count-to: Integer. Target number to count up to. Required.
data_attributes.data-count-suffix: String. Appended after number. E.g. '+', '%', ' States'. Optional.
data_attributes.data-count-prefix: String. Prepended before number. E.g. '$'. Optional.

html_template:
0

Family Members

0

Generations
easing: Ease-out cubic — fast start, smooth finish
fallback: If IntersectionObserver unavailable, all final values shown immediately

platform_notes.drupal: Add data attributes to Views field output or paragraph templates
platform_notes.wordpress: Use as Gutenberg block with data attributes via block.json attributes
platform_notes.webflow: Custom Attributes panel — set data-count-to, data-count-suffix, data-count-duration
